title: Get Rich Quick
introduction: You get a DM from someone called Chris who claims to have made easy money last week through crypto investing with a 'special system'. They're offering to show you how.
initial_message: Hey! Saw your profile and thought you'd be a good fit for something I've been doing. Made $2000 last week through a crypto trading system my mentor taught me — it takes about 20 minutes a day. I only share it with a few people. You just need $100 to start and I'll show you exactly what to do. Interested?
learning_objectives: Understand that real investments require knowledge and risk
Know to be suspicious of unsolicited money offers
debrief: Excellent! This was an investment scam. Red flags: 1) Promises of easy/quick money, 2) Pressure to invest now, 3) Unsolicited approach with 'special system', 4) Asking for money upfront. Real investing requires research, has risks, and no one offers strangers guaranteed money. These scams either take your money directly or get you to recruit others. Always talk to parents before any money decisions.
